description.value: Humans familiar with low-gravity environments are also better trained at dealing with the complete loss of gravity. At the end of each round in which you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Untethered], attempt a @Check[flat|dc:11]. On a success, you ignore the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Clumsy] and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] conditions imposed by being in zero gravity for 1 round and can increase or decrease the number of squares you move by up to 10 feet (up to 20 feet on a critical success).
